case_title: ESTA, MARCIA et al vs. MOUMTAZ, RAED et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTA, MARCIA UBALDO, ALVIN AS TO DEFENDANT MOUMTAZ, RAED DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED
SET FOR STATUS CONFERENCE HEARING SET FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 BY THE COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-22-1994, CONTINUED TO OCT-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-06-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-04-1994 CONTINUED FROM OCT-06-1994 TO NOV-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-04-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-04-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR DEC-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1994, DISMISSAL OSC DISCHARGED,NO CONTEMPT.
